name: Binimetinib
description: Binimetinib is under investigation for the treatment of Lungcancer and Carcinoma of the Lung.
mechanismOfAction: Binimetinib is an MEK inhibitor. MEK is an enzyme that regulates the biosynthesis of the inflammatory cytokines TNF, IL-6 and IL-1 however MEK inhibitors interferes with these biosynthetic processes.
